thread.title: UFC boss Dana White says he is done with ‘disgusting’ politics after backing Trump | Business | albanyherald.com
thread.title_full: UFC boss Dana White says he is done with ‘disgusting’ politics after backing Trump | Business | albanyherald.com

author: Liam Reilly, CNN
title: UFC boss Dana White says he is done with ‘disgusting’ politics after backing Trump | Business | albanyherald.com
text:
New York (CNN) — Dana White is tapping out of politics.
After embracing President-elect Donald Trump, the Ultimate Fighting Championship chief executive said in an interview this week he won’t help future presidential campaigns, stating he “want[s] nothing to do with politics.”
